title: Do people living on the ground know that
display_title: Do people living on the ground know that
wikitext:
[]: Do people living on the ground know that?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Jul 29, 2006 1:20 am Most citizens live on the ground. They live in Tokyo 3. However I wonder if they know there's an empty space below them? They know the buildings can sink into the space underneath, but do they realise there is a secret organisation down there?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 29, 2006 3:01 am The impression I got was that Tokyo-3 was pretty much a "company town" - most of the families living there would have at least one member working for NERV. Maybe the shopkeepers and similar would be out of the loop.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:38 am In Episode 19, the shelter Shinji is in is clearly located inside the Geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 29, 2006 10:31 am If they don't work for NERV, like both Kensuke and Touji's fathers, they have to take shelter in the Geofront at some point. It's pretty much common knowledge, but as for what they do, I wouldn't be surprised if they were mostly oblivious prior to the arrival of the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:12 pm Mining and chem research, perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Mon Jul 31, 2006 6:09 am Everyone probably knows about the empty space below them... Whether or not they know how large that space is is a different story. Think about it, they live and work there, right? An Angel comes and attacks, the buildings in the city sink into the ground in cases built specifically for that one. I'm certain the people know that there is some sort of space below them. Since most probably work for NERV, they know about the Geofront and as it has been stated earlier, Shinji was in the Geofront during one of the episodes having been evacuated with the rest of the students at his school... Once again, I bet most, if not, all people in Tokyo-3 know about the Geofront and thus, the large space below them. As for them knowing about NERV? If it is a company town... Then dur... Yeah, they know about NERV. If it isn't, that's where it gets interesting. I'd say, again, that most people would know about it... But that depends on how much NERV "advertises" (the NERV logo stamped onto various different products.) Government can be sneaky and could potentially keep an organization as large as NERV undercover... I bet very few people know about SEELE. It's iffy on that one, but I'm going to bet that most people know about NERV, while Government could keep something that big underwraps, there'll be citizens that can find things out... And it's hard to miss a giant robot battle in the middle of your city. Trust me... We had a huge mecha fight over here in Portland two days ago... I saw them, it was brutal.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Ti
